const inspPrefixID = {{node:get_node_oizOcbmi.data.data.id}} || "";
const grData = {{node:code_node_D9IbUV8t.data.grData}} || {};
const grItem ={{node:code_node_D9IbUV8t.data.grItem}} || {};

const inspectionData = {
  inspection_lot_no: "issued",
  inspection_lot_no_type: inspPrefixID,
  goods_receiving_no: grData.id,
  gr_no_display: grData.gr_no,
  insp_lot_created_on: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0],
  plant_id: grData.plant_id,
  organization_id: grData.organization_id,
  inspector_name: grData.created_by,
  receiving_insp_status: "Created",
  inspection_pass_fail: "0 / 0",
  remarks: "",
  lot_created_by: "System",
  insp_start_time: "",
  insp_end_time: "",
  table_insp_mat: [
    {
      item_id: grItem.item_id,
      item_code: {{node:get_node_x5DWSZ3z.data.data.material_code}},
      item_name: grItem.item_name || "",
      item_desc: grItem.item_desc || "",
      batch_id: {{node:code_node_ip8w2l8k.data.batchId}} || "",
      received_qty: grItem.received_qty,
      received_uom: grItem.item_uom,
      passed_qty: 0,
      failed_qty: 0,
      gr_line_no: {{node:code_node_D9IbUV8t.data.nextIndex}},
      batch_no: grItem.item_batch_no || "",
      total_price: {{node:workflow_node_bThL52BP.data.totalPrice}} || 0,
      location_id: grItem.location_id,
      unit_price: {{node:workflow_node_bThL52BP.data.unitPrice}} || 0,
    },
  ],
};

return {
  inspectionData
}
